ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player belongs to */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the player */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player in inches */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player in pounds */,
  "position" TEXT /* Playing position of the player */,
  "college" TEXT /* College or university attended by the player */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_round" INTEGER /* Round the player was drafted in */,
  "draft_position" INTEGER /* Position the player was drafted in */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Total games played in the player's career */,
  "games_started" INTEGER /* Total games started in the player's career */,
  "minutes_per_game" REAL /* Average minutes played per game in the player's career */,
  "career_high_points" INTEGER /* Career high points scored by the player */,
  "career_high_rebounds" INTEGER /* Career high rebounds by the player */,
  "career_high_assists" INTEGER /* Career high assists by the player */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the player's record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the player's record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the basketball team */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation for the team */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "arena" TEXT /* Name of the team's arena */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Seating capacity of the arena */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference the team belongs to */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the team belongs to */,
  "established" INTEGER /* Year the team was established */,
  "owner" TEXT /* Owner of the team */,
  "general_manager" TEXT /* General manager of the team */,
  "head_coach" TEXT /* Head coach of the team */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the team's record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the team's record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance stat entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the stats belong to */,
  "season" INTEGER /* The season the statistics are recorded for */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Total games played by the player in the season */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Total wins by the player/team in the season */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Total losses by the player/team in the season */,
  "minutes" REAL /* Average minutes played per game */,
  "points" REAL /* Average points scored per game */,
  "fgm" REAL /* Field goals made per game */,
  "fga" REAL /* Field goals attempted per game */,
  "fg_percent" REAL /* Field goal percentage */,
  "three_pm" REAL /* Three-point field goals made per game */,
  "three_pa" REAL /* Three-point field goals attempted per game */,
  "three_percent" REAL /* Three-point field goal percentage */,
  "ftm" REAL /* Free throws made per game */,
  "fta" REAL /* Free throws attempted per game */,
  "ft_percent" REAL /* Free throw percentage */,
  "oreb" INTEGER /* Offensive rebounds per game */,
  "dreb" INTEGER /* Defensive rebounds per game */,
  "reb" INTEGER /* Total rebounds per game */,
  "ast" INTEGER /* Assists per game */,
  "tov" INTEGER /* Turnovers per game */,
  "stl" INTEGER /* Steals per game */,
  "blk" INTEGER /* Blocks per game */,
  "pf" INTEGER /* Personal fouls per game */,
  "fp" REAL /* Fantasy points scored per game */,
  "dd2" INTEGER /* Double-doubles recorded */,
  "td3" INTEGER /* Triple-doubles recorded */,
  "plus_minus" REAL /* Plus-minus rating */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the performance stat record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the performance stat record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the injury belongs to */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date the injury occurred */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury (e.g., knee, ankle, etc.) */,
  "games_missed" INTEGER /* Number of games missed due to the injury */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the injury record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the injury record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the award belongs to */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award (e.g., MVP, Rookie of the Year, etc.) */,
  "award_year" INTEGER /* Year the award was won */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the award record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the award record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Coach, Analyst) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Description of permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stats_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance stats being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the stats */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the stats were accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stats_access_stat_id FOREIGN KEY ("stat_id") REFERENCES performance_stats ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stats_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance stats being visualized */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., bar chart, line chart, etc.) */,
  "visualization_data" TEXT /* Visualization data (e.g., chart coordinates, labels, etc.) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the visualization record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the visualization record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_stat_id FOREIGN KEY ("stat_id") REFERENCES performance_stats ("stat_id")
)
